# Comprehensive Age Value Testing (GEDCOM 7.0)

## Description
Comprehensive GEDCOM 7.0 age value test file containing extensive coverage of all age format variations and age field testing scenarios. This file validates the parser's ability to handle various age representations, age calculations, and age-related edge cases in GEDCOM 7.0.

## Test Case Type
- **Age field testing**: Tests all GEDCOM 7.0 age formats and variations
- **Format validation**: Ensures proper age string parsing
- **Specification edge cases**: Comprehensive age value coverage
- **Boundary conditions**: Tests limits and special cases for age values
- **Large dataset**: Contains extensive age format examples (5.9 KB)

## File Information
- **GEDCOM Version**: 7.0
- **Format**: `.ged` (standard GEDCOM text format)
- **Size**: ~5.9 KB
- **Encoding**: UTF-8
- **Source Software**: gedcom7code test suite

## Provenance
- **Source**: gedcom7code/test-files (GEDCOM 7.0 conversion testing)
- **URL**: https://github.com/gedcom7code/test-files
- **Availability**: Open source test files
- **Purpose**: Conversion testing and validation

## License & Usage
- **License**: Open source test files
- **Attribution**: gedcom7code project
- **Usage Rights**: Educational and testing purposes
- **Restrictions**: Subject to project license

## Testing Coverage
- **Age formats**: Various age representations (years, months, days)
- **Age calculations**: Calculated ages from birth and death dates
- **Exact ages**: Precise age values
- **Approximate ages**: Estimated or uncertain ages
- **Age ranges**: Age spans and ranges
- **Special formats**: Different age field layouts
- **Edge cases**: Boundary values, zero ages, extreme ages
- **Age at events**: Ages at specific events (marriage, death, etc.)
- **Age validation**: Ensures age values are reasonable and properly formatted

## Notes
- Comprehensive age format test suite
- Essential for validating age field parsing
- Tests both standard and edge-case age formats
- Useful for age calculation and validation logic testing
- Demonstrates GEDCOM 7.0's age handling capabilities
- Should be used to validate age field parsing completeness
- Contains over 5.9 KB of age format test cases
